text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The Kikuka Sho is finally here! Who will come out
on top?

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
I wonder how today's race will go. Word on the
street is that Rice Shower's really improved lately.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
But this one is a 3,000-meter long-distance race,
so it's hard to say...

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
I have no doubt Bourbon can do this, though!
She's not called Incline Invicta for nothing!

text_block_list.name: Short-haired Reporter
text_block_list.text: Give it everything you've got, Bourbon!

The excitement in the stands can be felt even in
the runners' tunnel.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Trainer. An error has occurred.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Something deep in my chest feels... itchy... It feels
like a "floating" sensation.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Resolution method unknown. Are you aware of
any processes for resolving such issues?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Order acknowledged. Initiating deep breathing. Inhale... Exhale... Inhale...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Whew...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Elimination of itchiness confirmed. Thank you,
Trainer.
choice_data_list: Just stay calm, go out there and win!
Just stay calm, go out there and win!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Understood. Running in the Triple Crown has
been my dream since childhood. This summer has
shown me how committed I am to achieving just
that.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I will most certainly win.
And off she goes.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: B-Bourbon!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'm so sorry for the trouble... back at the
Japanese Derby, I mean...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
There is no need to apologize. You were no
trouble at all.

Upon closer inspection, it looks like Rice Shower's
knees are quite scraped up.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
It appears that these injuries were inflicted during
training. I assume you have been conducting
arduous workouts.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I ran so much this summer...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Because I want to catch up to you... No, that's not
right...

The previously timid Rice Shower looks up at
Mihono Bourbon as if she's set her mind on
something.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I want to beat you, Bourbon!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I finally realized something.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Admiring someone and chasing after them isn't
enough.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I need to catch up, pass you, and then become
the person that I want to be!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Even if... Even if that means getting in your way!

Her purple eyes shine brilliantly. With her timidity
gone, she seems like someone different entirely.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Analysis complete. Results indicate that this is
your "fighting spirit."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I acknowledge your determination, Rice.
However...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I won't back down either, for this is my "will."

Rice Shower's motivation seems to have an effect
on Bourbon, lighting a fire deep in her eyes.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Right!

Exchanging intense looks, the two of them head
to the racetrack.

Past the bright lights at the end of the tunnel,
countless fans are eagerly waiting for the two to
enter.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
It is almost time. Preparations are complete.
Trainer, I'm off.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I will see you after the race.

As if on cue, both racers dash off and begin their
fierce battle.
